_schema: LitRPG progression ledger (the G2 'progression-state' file). One record per mechanical reveal/gain/use per character per chapter — HUD/loadout, stats, class, skills, abilities, and progression beats. Populated by the chronicler (tools/chronicler_codex.workflow.js) and confirmed by David; the narrative-state companion to the forge Codex (canon entities), timeline.json (events), and promises.json (payoff ledger).
_note: Created 2026-05-31 from the G2 Chronicler Ch03 run (reports/ch03-chronicler-2026-05-31.md, Appendix A). 10 confirmed events across Nate/Flint/Rex/Judge. The Ch03 HUD-color drift (Codex said green, prose said blue) was RESOLVED this session: blue confirmed canon, Codex #11/#75/#1 corrected green→blue. Merge future chapters append-style under each character's by_chapter map.

ch03.name: HUD — two blue monochrome arcs (Basic phase)
ch03.detail: Exactly two curved BLUE monochrome bars at lower periphery: longer=Health, shorter=Stamina. No numbers/class sheet/inventory/map/quest log/compass/skill tree. Flint: 'You got two blue lines and me.' (Codex #11/#75/#1 corrected green→blue 2026-05-31 to match prose across Ch02 and Ch03.)

ch03.name: Health
ch03.detail: Longer arc; Flint estimates ~90% from bar length only (no numeric readout). Maps to lingering headache; 'something in your framework is still recalibrating.'

ch03.name: Stamina
ch03.detail: Shorter arc; Flint estimates ~80% from bar length only. No numeric value.

ch03.name: [PROCESSING]
ch03.detail: Class slot reads [PROCESSING] — System hasn't classified him or 'tried and choked.' Unassigned at chapter end. Engineer (#98) canon but NOT surfaced in-world (epistemic gate; after_ch03 lists Engineer under doesnt_know).

ch03.name: Structural Analysis
ch03.detail: One pre-loaded skill, Rank 1 Low. Verbatim: 'Reveals material type, quality grade, and durability of targeted objects. Passive scan, focus-activated.' Un-amplified floor — no load-path/failure-mode (Bezalel ceiling inactive). Matches #97/#109.

ch03.name: Structural Analysis — focus-activated scan (first use)
ch03.detail: Focuses on F-250 hood; tooltip resolves: '[Structural Analysis — Target: Ford F-250, steel frame. Material: low-carbon steel. Quality: Common. Durability: 72%.]' Exactly three fields, then nothing. Flat bottom-of-vision tooltip.

ch03.name: Tutorial Phase — entry
ch03.detail: Planet-wide 'TUTORIAL PHASE — COMMENCING' broadcast (HUD + bone-deep air pressure), 60-sec countdown. At zero blue arcs flare white; Nate + Rex + Judge pulled from pasture into instanced Tutorial. Hands deliberately empty — no weapons/inventory carried. Ford left idling, door open. Unnamed warm presence pulses once before the pull.

ch03.name: Companion online — F.L.I.N.T. (Field Logic Interface, Network Tethered)
ch03.detail: MSG-standard companion, Spirit-rewritten pre-boot (source not self-known). Outbound reporting severed, inbound one-way, personality matrix flagged unauthorized, directive stack scrambled, loyalty re-pointed to Nate. Bidirectional link active from first contact. Names self on-page (reveal locked Ch3 per #70). Detects unnamed larger/older unclassified subsystem without diagnosing it.

ch03.name: Tutorial entry — transported via companion bond
ch03.detail: Border Collie. Two-way-link tell: head-snaps toward Nate, searches empty pasture for Flint's voice (L59). At countdown jumps from truck bed on own decision (no whistle), sets shoulder-to-shin at Nate's LEFT leg; bond transmits heat/'With you.' Pulled into instanced Tutorial alongside Nate (#88). No mechanical stats/skills revealed.

ch03.name: Tutorial entry — transported via companion bond
ch03.detail: Blue Heeler. During recovery holds PERIMETER (orbiting ~10 ft, ears rotating, sharp exhale at tree line each third pass), contrast with Rex. At broadcast barks twice at the sky 'sharp as a gavel strike' (established gavel motif). At countdown plants at Nate's RIGHT leg, perfectly still for first time all morning; pulled in alongside (#88). No mechanical stats/skills revealed.
